description: Opt-in live certification scenarios for Telegram plus authenticated browser session profiles. Scenarios are intentionally read-only and redacted.

scenarios.label: Instagram saved login read
scenarios.prompt: Use the saved Instagram login profile to check whether the authenticated Instagram shell is reachable.

scenarios.prompt: Use the saved TikTok login profile to check whether the authenticated TikTok feed shell is reachable.
